visual_description: In a dimly lit car interior, a man in the back seat wipes his nose with a white bandaged hand while sweat glistens on his face. The view shifts to the front seat where a man drives, his face also covered in sweat, with another passenger visible behind him also wiping his face.
audio_description: The audio is dominated by heavy, ragged breathing and faint sobbing.
